title: Ex-Trump Press Sec. Stephanie Grisham gives speech during DNC: Watch
shortDescription: Stephanie Grisham served as the White House Press Secretary from July 2019 to April 2020 during former President Donald Trump's presidency.

title: Donald Trump's press secretary backs Kamala Harris
shortDescription: Stephanie Grisham, former press secretary under the Donald Trump administration, delivered remarks in support of Kamala Harris at the DNC convention.

title: JD Vance goes after Democrats' crime policies
shortDescription: JD Vance spoke to a small crowd and reporters, attacking Democrats' policies on public safety and crime ahead of a Harris-Walz rally in Wisconsin.

title: Republicans for Harris: See who will take the stage in Chicago

title: Post wrongly links quote about 'grocery ID' to Trump | Fact check
shortDescription: Donald Trump criticized the Biden administration over inflation at a news conference, but video shows he didn't say the quote in the post.

title: Baseless claim Trump fell asleep at NATO summit in 2017 | Fact check
shortDescription: The circulating image shows Trump looking down at one point during the NATO ceremony, according to its European Pressphoto Agency caption.
